topics.name: preventive controls
topics.description: Controls designed to stop an undesired event from occurring in the first place.

topics.name: detective controls
topics.description: Controls designed to identify an undesired event after it has occurred.

topics.name: corrective controls
topics.description: Controls designed to remediate the impact of an undesired event once it has been detected.

topics.name: control ownership
topics.description: Assigning a named, accountable owner responsible for a control's design and ongoing operation.

topics.name: control effectiveness
topics.description: Assessing whether a control is achieving its intended risk-mitigation outcome.
